name_en: Genuine factory-made, authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
name_cn:
Genuine factory-made, authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
Small BOOK TOTE Handbag
Blue Oblique Print
Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote handbag is a flagship piece embodying the Dior aesthetic.
Adorned with blue Oblique print throughout, featuring a "CHRISTIAN DIOR" logo on the front, it can hold various daily essentials.
Small size, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, can be carried by hand.
Front featuring "CHRISTIAN DIOR" logo
Includes dust bag
Dimensions: 26.5 x 21 x 14 cm
Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11
